query:
CREATE TABLE `internet_pricebook_items` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`versionId` int NOT NULL,
	`productCode` varchar(64) DEFAULT '',
	`speedTier` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`serviceType` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`supportTier` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`contractTerm` varchar(8) NOT NULL,
	`zone` varchar(16) DEFAULT 'all',
	`supportNote` varchar(128) DEFAULT '',
	`dattoProductName` varchar(512) DEFAULT '',
	`wholesaleCost` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL,
	`sellPrice` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL,
	`grossProfit` decimal(10,4) NOT NULL,
	`marginPercent` decimal(8,6) NOT NULL,
	`carbonPlanName` varchar(256) DEFAULT '',
	`carbonValidatedCost` decimal(10,4),
	`carbonValidatedAt` timestamp,
	`costVariance` decimal(10,4),
	`lowMarginFlag` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`lowMarginThreshold` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT '20.00',
	`sellPriceOverride` decimal(10,4),
	`overrideNote` text,
	`overriddenBy` varchar(256) DEFAULT '',
	`overriddenAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `internet_pricebook_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `internet_pricebook_versions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`label` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`sourceFile` varchar(512) DEFAULT '',
	`effectiveDate` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`importedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`importedBy` varchar(256) DEFAULT '',
	`notes` text,
	CONSTRAINT `internet_pricebook_versions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
